mapper.select: SELECT id, name, score, age, created_at, updated_at FROM student WHERE score BETWEEN #{min} AND #{max} ORDER BY score DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (name, score, age) VALUES (#{name}, #{score}, #{age})

INSERT INTO student (name, score, age) VALUES
(#{s.name}, #{s.score}, #{s.age})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, score, age, created_at, updated_at FROM student ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
